description: Create an LCIA method named 'Regional Water Scarcity v1.0' containing an impact category 'Water Scarcity Potential' with the reference unit 'm3 eq'. Assign characterization factors to at least three water-related flows from the USLCI database within this category. Calculate the LCIA results for a water-consuming process using this method and export the results to '~/LCA_Results/water_scarcity_result.csv'.
